Interface Point

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry

ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

A two dimensional point, optionally with measure, height, and ID attributes.

[Guid("1B077915-38C5-11D0-92D2-00805F7C28B0")]
public interface Point : IPoint, IGeometry
